metadata.title: Law Office Conevski — Skopje
metadata.description: Law Office Conevski provides expert legal representation in criminal, corporate, and civil law. Based in Skopje, North Macedonia, serving clients since 1996.

hero.headline:
We Specialise
In All Aspects
Of Law

values.heading: The virtue of justice consists in moderation as regulated by wisdom

corporate.title: Corporate Law
corporate.description: From company formation and commercial contracts to mergers and regulatory compliance, we provide expert legal guidance for businesses operating in North Macedonia.

criminal.title: Criminal Law
criminal.description: We provide vigorous criminal defence representation, protecting your rights from initial investigation through trial with extensive experience in Macedonian criminal proceedings.

civil.title: Civil Law
civil.description: We handle civil disputes including property matters, inheritance, contractual claims, and compensation cases with diligence and a commitment to achieving the best outcome.

years.label: Years of Practice
years.description: Over 28 years of legal practice in North Macedonia, delivering expert representation across criminal, civil, and corporate matters.

since.label: Serving Since
since.description: Transparent, fair pricing with flexible arrangements. Law Office Conevski — trusted by clients in Skopje since 1996.

guide.heading:
If you are in
trouble, our lawyers
can guide you
guide.description: At Law Office Conevski, we bring decades of hands-on expertise to every case. Whether you face a criminal charge, a civil dispute, or a complex commercial matter, we provide clear legal guidance and steadfast advocacy from day one.

services.heading:
Ready to Provide
the Best
Representation
for You
services.description: With nearly three decades of practice in North Macedonia, Law Office Conevski delivers expert legal services across a broad spectrum of cases.

expert.title: Expert Representation
expert.description: We bring deep knowledge of Macedonian law and nearly three decades of courtroom experience to fight for the best possible outcome in your case.

clarity.title: Case Clarity
clarity.description: You have the right to fully understand every aspect of your legal situation. We explain your position clearly, honestly, and without jargon.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.description: Our firm is committed to keeping you informed and supported at every stage of your legal proceedings.

testimonials.heading:
Hear What Our
Clients have
to Say

marko.quote: Mr. Conevski represented me in a business dispute and achieved an outcome I didn't think was possible. His expertise in corporate law and his calm, methodical approach gave me full confidence throughout the process.
marko.name: Marko P.
marko.title: Business Owner, Skopje

elena.quote: Law Office Conevski guided me through an incredibly difficult personal matter with professionalism and genuine care. I was always kept informed and felt truly supported. I cannot recommend them highly enough.
elena.name: Elena V.
elena.title: Client, Skopje

footer.description: Law Office Conevski provides comprehensive legal services across North Macedonia. Founded in 1996 and based in Skopje, we are dedicated to protecting the rights and interests of every client.
